name: Figma design cleanup before site dashboard
phase675HygieneFixes: Updated the Phase 6.75 run-log commit/push status to committed and pushed as d6711a docs: audit multisite sales MVP readiness.

productHeaderPattern.defaultEyebrow: Database-backed MVP • Private evidence • Audit-safe operations
productHeaderPattern.defaultSubtitle: A serious school-operations workspace for progress tracking, private evidence, mentor scope, review workflows, and site-level oversight.

productHeaderRenderPaths: renderSignIn renders renderProductHeader({ titleId: "signInTitle" }) for the unauthenticated/sign-in surface.
renderAppShell renders renderProductHeader({ context: headerContext, readOnly: roles.has("viewer") }) for authenticated workspace users before active section content.
statusMappingUsage: statusPill normalizes input through normalizeStatus and statusClassFor.
statusClassFor uses STATUS_CLASS_BY_STATUS to map operational aliases onto Figma palette classes.
Existing dashboard, review, student evidence, presentation, archive, import, audit, mentor, and readiness rows continue to call statusPill.
viewerReadOnlyRenderPath: renderAppShell passes readOnly: roles.has("viewer") into renderProductHeader.
renderReadOnlyBanner renders data-workspace-mode="read-only" for viewer users.
optionalCopyChanges: Changed generic dashboard empty copy to explain no urgent records match the current view.
Changed program and student-list empty copy from scope jargon to assigned-view language.
Changed teacher review empty copy to mention revision-requested records.
Expanded viewer read-only copy to mention private-evidence status.
deadCssDeadHelperGuard: tests/workspace-app.test.mjs asserts product header CSS exists and renderProductHeader is called from sign-in and authenticated workspace paths.
tests/workspace-app.test.mjs asserts posture chip strings live in workspace.js and render in sign-in/authenticated output.
tests/workspace-app.test.mjs asserts status mapping helpers exist and statusPill is used by existing status surfaces.
tests/workspace-app.test.mjs asserts problem-state CSS exists and renderProblemState is called by multiple real states.
tests/workspace-app.test.mjs asserts viewer read-only output renders for a viewer user.
No future-only CSS/helper was added in this phase without at least one real app usage.

designCleanupAcceptanceChecklist.cleanupType: CSS and JS render cleanup with HTML asset-version bump; no backend or route changes.
designCleanupAcceptanceChecklist.deadHelperConfirmation: Confirmed by source/render tests; no new CSS/helper was added without real app usage or a documented future-only reason.
